channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Senate Removes Deputy Minority Whip After Turbulent Meeting
item.description: The article details the chaotic removal of Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna from his position as Senate deputy minority whip following a heated parliamentary meeting. The event, marked by shouting, chaos,...

item.title: Trump Pushes for Election Security Measures Amid Midterm Elections
item.description: US President Donald Trump has reignited unfounded allegations of widespread voter fraud and Chinese interference in the electoral process, framing these claims as a critical warning ahead of the upcom...

item.title: Challenges in the Fight Against Corruption and Accountability Issues
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing challenges faced by the Investigative Directorate Against Corruption (IDAC), established by President Cyril Ramaphosa to combat corruption. It highlights the lack of ...

item.title: Scottie Scheffler Strong Start at British Open Amidst Competitive Field
item.description: US golfer Scottie Scheffler showcased his form with a solid opening round at the 154th Open Championship, sitting just one stroke off the clubhouse lead after his front nine at Royal Birkdale. The wor...

item.title: Assam woman deported to Bangladesh despite Gauhati High Court ordering fresh hearing on her citizenship case
item.description: An Assam woman, Mumtaz Begum, was allegedly deported to Bangladesh even though the Gauhati High Court had recently set aside an earlier Foreigners Tribunal order against her and directed a fresh exami...

item.title: Toronto FC and CF Montréal Draw 0-0 in MLS Match
item.description: Toronto FC and CF Montréal ended their MLS match in a 0-0 draw during the team's return from a break. The game, played at the stadium in Montreal, saw both teams struggle to break the deadlock despite...

item.title: PCSO partners with tech firm to expand lotto offerings
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) has entered into a partnership with ComWorks, a retail technology firm, to expand its lotto game availability and increase revenues for health and char...

item.title: Study highlights focal therapy as effective alternative to surgery for prostate cancer with fewer side effects
item.description: A major study led by Imperial College London suggests that focal therapy, a less invasive treatment for prostate cancer, is as effective as surgery or radiotherapy but with significantly fewer side ef...

item.title: Physiotherapy Society Clarifies Mary Habila's Status Amid Minister's Claims
item.description: The Nigeria Society of Physiotherapy (NSP) has clarified that Mary Habila, the woman who died at Minister David Umahi's residence, is not listed as a registered physiotherapist, contradicting claims b...

item.title: Australia risks falling further behind the US in science if it mirrors its anti-China policies
item.description: The article discusses the potential consequences of Australia adopting the US's restrictive approach to China in scientific collaborations. It highlights the US National Science Foundation's recent ba...

item.title: Liz Truss's muted London CPAC event contrasts with its US counterpart
item.description: The article critiques Liz Truss's attempt to replicate the United States' Conservative Political Action Conference (CPAC) in London, highlighting its lacklustre reception compared to the vibrant Ameri...

item.title: Common Mistakes Foreign Developer Tools Make in Entering the Korean Market
item.description: The article highlights critical errors foreign developer products often make when entering the Korean market. Key mistakes include prioritizing translation over ensuring a seamless first-run experienc...

item.title: Pauline Hanson's Political Struggles: Navigating Controversial Allies and Internal Tensions

item.title: Ontario Lawyer Suspended for Using AI in Court Submissions
item.description: The Law Society of Ontario has suspended a lawyer for six months after a judge exposed her use of AI-generated, non-existent legal precedents during a family and estate law hearing. The case marks the...

item.title: Two Young Men Accused of Stealing Earphones from Electronics Shop in Daylight
item.description: CCTV footage has exposed two young men who allegedly stole earphones from an electronics shop during the day. The incident, recorded around noon, shows the pair entering the shop where a woman was at ...

item.title: Kogi State Successfully Rescues Kidnapped Victims in Dekina
item.description: The Kogi State Government has confirmed the successful rescue of four individuals kidnapped during an attack on an unauthorized examination center in Olowa, Dekina Local Government Area. The Commissio...

item.title: San Francisco Mayor Proposes Stricter Regulations for Autonomous Vehicles Following Waymo Traffic Incident
item.description: San Francisco Mayor Daniel Lurie has called for stricter regulations for autonomous vehicles after Waymo's robotaxis caused a massive traffic jam during the July 4 fireworks event. The incident, which...

item.title: Trump Addresses Election Security Concerns in Prime-Time Speech
item.description: President Donald Trump delivered a prime-time address on election security, as reported by The Washington Post. The White House emphasized that the speech would include major revelations about vulnera...

item.title: Supreme Court Dismisses Appeal Against Vote Recount in Karnataka Legislative Council Election
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has dismissed an appeal filed by M.K. Pranesh, the Deputy Chairman of the Karnataka Legislative Council, challenging the High Court's order for a recount of votes in the 202...

item.title: KATSEYE Releases Trailer for Their Documentary 'KATSEYE: Wild Hearts'
item.description: KATSEYE, the global girl group formed by the Philippine entertainment company ABS-CBN, has officially released the trailer for their upcoming documentary film titled 'KATSEYE: Wild Hearts'. The docume...
